examples: We had both become jaded, disinterested, and disillusioned.
I felt terribly jaded after working all weekend.
It was a meal to tempt even the most jaded palate.
Even the most jaded traveller succumbs to the spectacle of Santorini's surreal landscape and dramatic sunsets.
"Plasma schmasma, " as one jaded East Coast friend of mine repeats himself every year.
